Path: apps/dream/websocket/consumers/dream_images.py
 1	"""
 2	梦境图片 WebSocket 消费者
 3	
 4	处理梦境图片上传状态的 WebSocket 连接和消息交换
 5	"""
 6	import json
 7	import logging
 8	import time
 9	import asyncio
 10	import urllib.parse
 11	from channels.generic.websocket import AsyncWebsocketConsumer
 12	from channels.db import database_sync_to_async
 13	from django.conf import settings
 14	import jwt
 15	from apps.dream.models import Dream, User, DreamImage
 16	
 17	logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
 18	
 19	
 20	class DreamImagesConsumer(AsyncWebsocketConsumer):
 21	 """
 22	 梦境图片上传状态 WebSocket 消费者
 23	 处理客户端与服务器之间的 WebSocket 连接，推送图片上传状态更新
 24	 """
 25	
 26	 async def connect(self):
 27	 """
 28	 建立 WebSocket 连接
 29	 """
 30	 self.dream_id = self.scope['url_route']['kwargs']['dream_id']
 31	 self.room_group_name = f'dream_images_{self.dream_id}'
 32	 self.authenticated = False
 33	 self.ping_task = None
 34	
 35	 # 从URL查询参数获取token
 36	 query_string = self.scope.get('query_string', b'').decode()
 37	 query_params = dict(urllib.parse.parse_qsl(query_string))
 38	 token = query_params.get('token')
 39	
 40	 # 认证检查
 41	 if not token or not await self.verify_token(token):
 42	 await self.close(code=4001)
 43	 return
 44	
 45	 # 客户端连接到 WebSocket 端点，将连接添加到特定通道组：self.room_group_name
 46	 await self.channel_layer.group_add(self.room_group_name, self.channel_name)
 47	 await self.accept()
 48	 
 49	 # 认证成功
 50	 self.authenticated = True
 51	 
 52	 # 发送连接成功消息并启动心跳任务
 53	 await self.send_json({
 54	 'type': 'connection_established',
 55	 'dream_id': self.dream_id,
 56	 'message': '连接已建立，等待图片处理状态更新'
 57	 })
 58	 
 59	 self.ping_task = asyncio.create_task(self.server_ping())
 60	
 61	 async def disconnect(self, close_code):
 62	 """
 63	 关闭 WebSocket 连接
 64	 """
 65	 # 停止心跳任务
 66	 if self.ping_task:
 67	 self.ping_task.cancel()
 68	 self.ping_task = None
 69	
 70	 # 将连接从通道组中移除
 71	 try:
 72	 await self.channel_layer.group_discard(self.room_group_name, self.channel_name)
 73	 except Exception:
 74	 pass
 75	
 76	 async def receive_json(self, content):
 77	 """
 78	 接收并处理 WebSocket 消息
 79	 """
 80	 if not self.authenticated:
 81	 return
 82	 
 83	 message_type = content.get('type')
 84	
 85	 # 处理不同类型的消息
 86	 try:
 87	 if message_type == 'ping':
 88	 await self.send_json({'type': 'pong', 'timestamp': time.time()})
 89	 elif message_type == 'request_status':
 90	 await self.handle_status_request()
 91	 else:
 92	 await self.send_json({'type': 'error', 'message': f'未知消息类型: {message_type}'})
 93	 except Exception as e:
 94	 if self.authenticated:
 95	 await self.send_json({'type': 'error', 'message': f'处理消息失败: {str(e)}'})
 96	
 97	 async def send_json(self, content):
 98	 """
 99	 向客户端发送 JSON 数据，带有错误处理
 100	 """
 101	 try:
 102	 await self.send(text_data=json.dumps(content))
 103	 return True
 104	 except Exception:
 105	 return False
 106	
 107	 async def handle_status_request(self):
 108	 """
 109	 处理状态请求，返回梦境的最新图片处理状态
 110	 """
 111	 if not self.authenticated:
 112	 return
 113	
 114	 try:
 115	 # 从数据库获取梦境图片
 116	 dream_images = await self.get_dream_images()
 117	
 118	 # 构建图片数据
 119	 images_data = [{'id': img.id, 'url': img.image_url, 'position': img.position}
 120	 for img in dream_images] if dream_images else []
 121	
 122	 # 发送状态响应 - 即使没有图片也要发送状态
 123	 await self.send_json({
 124	 'type': 'image_update',
 125	 'dream_id': self.dream_id,
 126	 'images': images_data,
 127	 'status': 'completed' if dream_images else 'processing',
 128	 'timestamp': time.time(),
 129	 'message': '已获取最新状态' if dream_images else '图片处理中，请稍候...'
 130	 })
 131	 except Exception as e:
 132	 await self.send_json({
 133	 'type': 'error',
 134	 'message': f'获取状态失败: {str(e)}'
 135	 })
 136	
 137	 async def verify_token(self, token):
 138	 """
 139	 验证JWT令牌
 140	 """
 141	 try:
 142	 # 解码令牌
 143	 payload = jwt.decode(
 144	 token,
 145	 settings.SIMPLE_JWT['SIGNING_KEY'],
 146	 algorithms=[settings.SIMPLE_JWT['ALGORITHM']]
 147	 )
 148	 user_id = payload['user_id']
 149	
 150	 # 验证用户和梦境
 151	 user = await database_sync_to_async(lambda: User.objects.filter(id=user_id).first())()
 152	 dream = await database_sync_to_async(lambda: Dream.objects.filter(id=self.dream_id).first())()
 153	 
 154	 return user and dream and dream.user_id == user_id
 155	 except Exception:
 156	 return False
 157	
 158	 async def server_ping(self):
 159	 """
 160	 服务器发送定期心跳以保持连接活跃
 161	 """
 162	 try:
 163	 while True:
 164	 await asyncio.sleep(15)
 165	 await self.send_json({'type': 'ping', 'timestamp': time.time()})
 166	 except asyncio.CancelledError:
 167	 pass
 168	 except Exception:
 169	 pass
 170	
 171	 async def image_update(self, event):
 172	 """
 173	 接收图片更新事件并发送给客户端
 174	 """
 175	 if self.authenticated:
 176	 await self.send_json(event)
 177	
 178	 @database_sync_to_async
 179	 def get_dream_images(self):
 180	 """
 181	 获取梦境图片列表
 182	 """
 183	 dream = Dream.objects.filter(id=self.dream_id).first()
 184	 return list(DreamImage.objects.filter(dream=dream)) if dream else []

Path: apps/dream/websocket/README.md
 1	# WebSocket 模块
 2	
 3	本模块负责处理 WebSocket 连接和消息传递，用于提供实时图片处理状态更新功能。采用异步处理模式，确保高效的实时通信。
 4	
 5	## 目录结构
 6	
 7	```
 8	websocket/
 9	├── __init__.py # 包初始化文件
 10	├── consumers/ # WebSocket 消费者
 11	│ ├── __init__.py # 消费者包初始化文件，导出 DreamImagesConsumer
 12	│ └── dream_images.py # 梦境图片处理状态 WebSocket 消费者
 13	├── routing/ # WebSocket 路由
 14	│ ├── __init__.py # 路由包初始化文件，导出 websocket_urlpatterns
 15	│ └── urls.py # WebSocket URL 路由配置
 16	└── utils/ # WebSocket 工具函数
 17	 ├── __init__.py # 工具包初始化文件，导出通知函数
 18	 └── notifications.py # 发送 WebSocket 通知的工具函数
 19	```
 20	
 21	## 核心组件
 22	
 23	### 1. WebSocket 消费者 (DreamImagesConsumer)
 24	
 25	梦境图片处理状态的WebSocket消费者，负责:
 26	
 27	- 处理客户端连接认证 (基于JWT)
 28	- 管理WebSocket连接生命周期
 29	- 处理客户端消息和请求
 30	- 发送图片处理状态更新通知
 31	- 维持心跳保持连接稳定
 32	
 33	```python
 34	# 消费者主要方法
 35	async def connect() # 处理连接请求与认证
 36	async def disconnect() # 处理连接断开
 37	async def receive_json() # 接收客户端JSON消息
 38	async def image_update() # 接收并转发图片更新事件
 39	```
 40	
 41	### 2. WebSocket 通知工具 (notifications.py)
 42	
 43	封装了向WebSocket通道发送消息的功能，支持:
 44	
 45	- 发送多种类型的状态更新
 46	- 失败重试机制
 47	- 异步到同步消息转换
 48	
 49	```python
 50	# 主要函数
 51	send_image_update(dream_id, image_urls, status, message) 
 52	```
 53	
 54	## 完整通信流程与技术原理
 55	
 56	### 1. 消息传递流程
 57	
 58	#### 从 Celery 任务到 Channel Layer
 59	
 60	```python
 61	# 在 Celery 任务中调用
 62	send_image_update(dream_id=123, image_urls=[...], status='completed')
...

 48	
 49	 /**
 50	 * 连接到WebSocket服务器
 51	 */
 52	 connect() {
 53	 // 避免重复连接或无效条件
 54	 if (!this.isComponentMounted || this.socket || !window.WebSocket) {
 55	 if (!window.WebSocket) notification.error('您的浏览器不支持实时图片更新');
 56	 return;
 57	 }
 58	
 59	 // 验证令牌
 60	 if (!this.authToken || this.authToken.trim() === '') {
 61	 return;
 62	 }
 63	
 64	 try {
 65	 // 构建WebSocket URL
 66	 const wsUrl = this.buildWebSocketUrl(this.authToken);
 67	
 68	 this.socket = new WebSocket(wsUrl);
 69	
 70	 // 设置事件处理器
 71	 this.socket.onopen = () => {
 72	 this.reconnectAttempts = 0;
 73	 };
 74	
 75	 this.socket.onmessage = (event) => {
 76	 if (!this.isComponentMounted) return;
 77	
 78	 try {
 79	 const data = JSON.parse(event.data);
 80	
 81	 switch (data.type) {
 82	 case 'connection_established':
 83	 this.isAuthenticated = true;
 84	 this.startPingInterval();
 85	 // 连接建立后立即请求当前状态
 86	 this.sendJSON({ type: 'request_status', dream_id: this.dreamId });
 87	 break;
 88	
 89	 case 'image_update':
 90	 // 确保回调函数存在且组件仍然挂载
 91	 if (this.onImageUpdate && this.isComponentMounted) {
 92	 this.onImageUpdate(data);
 93	 }
 94	 break;
 95	
 96	 case 'ping':
 97	 this.sendJSON({ type: 'pong', timestamp: Date.now() });
 98	 break;
 99	
 100	 case 'pong':
 101	 // 处理服务器的pong响应
 102	 break;
 103	
 104	 case 'error':
 105	 // 静默处理错误消息
 106	 break;
 107	 }
 108	 } catch (error) {
 109	 // 静默处理解析错误
 110	 }
 111	 };
 112	
 113	 this.socket.onclose = (event) => {
 114	 this.cleanup();
 115	 // 只在非手动关闭时尝试重连
 116	 if (!this.manualClose) {
 117	 this.scheduleReconnect();
 118	 }
 119	 };

Path: apps/dream/websocket/utils/notifications.py
 1	"""
 2	WebSocket 通知工具函数
 3	
 4	提供发送 WebSocket 消息的功能，主要用于异步任务完成后通知前端
 5	"""
 6	import logging
 7	import time
 8	from asgiref.sync import async_to_sync
 9	from channels.layers import get_channel_layer
 10	from django.conf import settings
 11	
 12	logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
 13	
 14	def send_image_update(dream_id, image_urls=None, status='completed', message=None):
 15	 """
 16	 发送图片处理状态更新到 WebSocket 通道
 17	 
 18	 Args:
 19	 dream_id: 梦境ID
 20	 image_urls: 处理完成的图片URL列表 [{"url": "http://...", "position": 0}, ...]
 21	 status: 处理状态 (processing, completed, failed, delete_processing, delete_completed, delete_failed)
 22	 message: 状态消息
 23	 
 24	 Returns:
 25	 bool: 发送是否成功
 26	 """
 27	 if not dream_id:
 28	 return False
 29	 
 30	 try:
 31	 # 获取 Django Channels 的通道层实例。通道层是 Channels 的核心组件，负责消息的路由和传递。
 32	 channel_layer = get_channel_layer()
 33	 if not channel_layer:
 34	 return False
 35	 
 36	 # 准备消息数据
 37	 message_data = {
 38	 'type': 'image_update', # 消息类型与 consumer 方法名匹配
 39	 'dream_id': dream_id,
 40	 'status': status,
 41	 'images': image_urls or [],
 42	 'timestamp': time.time()
 43	 }
 44	 
 45	 # 如果提供了消息文本，添加到数据中
 46	 if message:
 47	 message_data['message'] = message
 48	 
 49	 # 重试逻辑
 50	 max_retries = getattr(settings, 'WEBSOCKET_MAX_RETRIES', 3)
 51	 retry_delay = getattr(settings, 'WEBSOCKET_RETRY_DELAY', 1)
 52	 
 53	 # 发送消息到指定的通道组
 54	 group_name = f'dream_images_{dream_id}'
 55	 
 56	 for attempt in range(max_retries):
 57	 try:
 58	 # 消息通过 channel_layer.group_send 发送到通道组
 59	 # 由于 send_image_update 函数在同步环境（如 Celery 任务或视图函数）中调用，而 Channels 的通道层操作是异步的，所以需要这个转换器将异步函数转换为同步函数
 60	 async_to_sync(channel_layer.group_send)(group_name, message_data)
 61	 logger.info(f"WebSocket消息发送成功: dream_id={dream_id}, status={status}, images_count={len(image_urls or [])}")
 62	 return True
 63	 except Exception as e:
 64	 logger.warning(f"WebSocket消息发送失败 (尝试 {attempt + 1}/{max_retries}): {e}")
 65	 if attempt < max_retries - 1:
 66	 time.sleep(retry_delay)
 67	 
 68	 return False
 69	 
 70	 except Exception:
 71	 return False
...

 1	"""
 2	ASGI config for backend project.
 3	
 4	It exposes the ASGI callable as a module-level variable named ``application``.
 5	
 6	For more information on this file, see
 7	https://docs.djangoproject.com/en/4.2/howto/deployment/asgi/
 8	"""
 9	
 10	import os
 11	import django
 12	from django.core.asgi import get_asgi_application
 13	from channels.routing import ProtocolTypeRouter, URLRouter
 14	from channels.auth import AuthMiddlewareStack
 15	from channels.security.websocket import AllowedHostsOriginValidator
 16	
 17	
 18	# 设置Django的环境变量，指定设置模块
 19	os.environ.setdefault('DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE', 'config.settings.dev')
 20	
 21	# 初始化Django ASGI应用
 22	django_asgi_app = get_asgi_application()
 23	
 24	# 初始化Django
 25	django.setup()
 26	
 27	# 导入WebSocket路由
 28	from apps.dream.websocket.routing import websocket_urlpatterns # 更新为新的导入路径
 29	
 30	
 31	application = ProtocolTypeRouter({ # - 根据不同的协议类型（HTTP/WebSocket）路由到不同的处理器
 32	 "http": django_asgi_app, # Django视图处理HTTP请求
 33	 "websocket": AllowedHostsOriginValidator( # 验证WebSocket请求来源
 34	 AuthMiddlewareStack( # 提供认证中间件
 35	 URLRouter( # 处理WebSocket的URL路由
 36	 websocket_urlpatterns # 自定义的WebSocket路由配置
 37	 )
 38	 )
 39	 ),
 40	})

 75	 "url": image.image_url,
 76	 "position": image.position
 77	 })
 78

 137	# celery任务数据预处理
 138	def upload_images(dream_id: int, image_files: List[Dict], positions: List[int]) -> str:
 139	 """发送图片处理任务到Celery队列"""
 140	 try:
 141	 # 编码图片数据
 142	 encoded_files = [{
 143	 'name': file['name'],
 144	 'data': base64.b64encode(file['data']).decode('utf-8')
 145	 } for file in image_files]
 146	
 147	 # 发送Celery任务
 148	 result = celery_upload_images.delay(dream_id, encoded_files, positions)
 149	 return result.id
 150	 except Exception as e:
 151	 logger.error(f"发送图片处理任务失败: {str(e)}")
 152	 raise

 328	 def _process_image_uploads(self, dream, request):
 329	 """
 330	 准备并触发一个后台任务来处理新上传的图片。
 331	 """
 332	 try:
 333	 image_files, positions = [], []
 334	 
 335	 # 从请求中收集图片文件和元数据
 336	 for key in request.FILES:
 337	 if key.startswith("imageFile_"):
 338	 index = key.split("_")[1]
 339	 file = request.FILES[key]
 340	 
 341	 # 解析元数据以获取图片位置
 342	 metadata_str = request.data.get(f"imageMetadata_{index}", "{}")
 343	 metadata = json.loads(metadata_str) if isinstance(metadata_str, str) else metadata_str
 344	 
 345	 image_files.append({"name": file.name, "data": file.read()})
 346	 positions.append(metadata.get("position", 0))
 347	
 348	 # 如果有图片，则发送到后台任务队列
 349	 if image_files:
 350	 upload_images(dream.id, image_files, positions)
 351	 logger.info(f"已将 {len(image_files)} 个新图片发送到处理队列")
 352	
 353	 except Exception as e:
 354	 logger.error(f"图片上传任务准备失败: {e}")
 355	 raise ValidationError(f"图片上传任务准备失败: {e}")

 1	"""
 2	WebSocket 通知工具函数
 3	
 4	提供发送 WebSocket 消息的功能，主要用于异步任务完成后通知前端
 5	"""
 6	import logging
 7	import time
 8	from asgiref.sync import async_to_sync
 9	from channels.layers import get_channel_layer
 10	from django.conf import settings
 11	
 12	logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
 13	
 14	def send_image_update(dream_id, image_urls=None, status='completed', message=None):
 15	 """
 16	 发送图片处理状态更新到 WebSocket 通道
 17	 
 18	 Args:
 19	 dream_id: 梦境ID
 20	 image_urls: 处理完成的图片URL列表 [{"url": "http://...", "position": 0}, ...]
 21	 status: 处理状态 (processing, completed, failed, delete_processing, delete_completed, delete_failed)
 22	 message: 状态消息
 23	 
 24	 Returns:
 25	 bool: 发送是否成功
 26	 """
 27	 if not dream_id:
 28	 return False
 29	 
 30	 try:
 31	 # 获取 Django Channels 的通道层实例。通道层是 Channels 的核心组件，负责消息的路由和传递。
 32	 channel_layer = get_channel_layer()
 33	 if not channel_layer:
 34	 return False
 35	 
 36	 # 准备消息数据
 37	 message_data = {
 38	 'type': 'image_update', # 消息类型与 consumer 方法名匹配
 39	 'dream_id': dream_id,
 40	 'status': status,
 41	 'images': image_urls or [],
 42	 'timestamp': time.time()
 43	 }
 44	 
 45	 # 如果提供了消息文本，添加到数据中
 46	 if message:
 47	 message_data['message'] = message
 48	 
 49	 # 重试逻辑
 50	 max_retries = getattr(settings, 'WEBSOCKET_MAX_RETRIES', 3)
 51	 retry_delay = getattr(settings, 'WEBSOCKET_RETRY_DELAY', 1)
 52	 
 53	 # 发送消息到指定的通道组
 54	 group_name = f'dream_images_{dream_id}'
 55	 
 56	 for attempt in range(max_retries):
 57	 try:
 58	 # 消息通过 channel_layer.group_send 发送到通道组
 59	 # 由于 send_image_update 函数在同步环境（如 Celery 任务或视图函数）中调用，而 Channels 的通道层操作是异步的，所以需要这个转换器将异步函数转换为同步函数
 60	 async_to_sync(channel_layer.group_send)(group_name, message_data)
 61	 return True
 62	 except Exception:
 63	 if attempt < max_retries - 1:
 64	 time.sleep(retry_delay)
 65	 
 66	 return False
 67	 
 68	 except Exception:
 69	 return False

 46	
 47	 def _generate_bucket_name(self, username, user_id=None):
 48	 """生成规范的bucket名称"""
 49	 try:
 50	 base_name = "dreamlog"
 51	
 52	 # 优先使用user_id，因为它是唯一的数字
 53	 if user_id:
 54	 bucket_name = f"{base_name}-user-{user_id}"
 55	 return bucket_name
 56	
 57	 # 如果没有user_id，则使用username（向后兼容）
 58	 # 深度类型检查和处理
 59	 if isinstance(username, (list, tuple)):
 60	 username = username[0] if len(username) > 0 else 'unknown'
 61	 username = str(username or 'unknown').strip().lower()
 62	
 63	 # 清理非法字符（保留连字符）
 64	 username = re.sub(r'[^a-z0-9-]', '', username)
 65	
 66	 # 如果清理后为空，使用默认值
 67	 if not username:
 68	 username = f"user-{uuid.uuid4().hex[:8]}"
 69	
 70	 # 生成基础名称
 71	 bucket_name = f"{base_name}-{username}"
 72	
 73	 # 长度处理（确保符合OSS命名规范）
 74	 bucket_name = bucket_name[:63].ljust(3, '0') # 截断至63字符且至少3字符
 75	
 76	 return bucket_name

 134	 def upload_file(self, file_obj):
 135	 """上传文件到OSS"""
 136	 try:
 137	 # 获取STS凭证
 138	 sts_token = self._get_sts_token()
 139	
 140	 # 创建Bucket实例 - 使用StsAuth
 141	 auth = oss2.StsAuth(
 142	 sts_token['access_key_id'],
 143	 sts_token['access_key_secret'],
 144	 sts_token['security_token']
 145	
 146	 )
 147	 bucket = oss2.Bucket(auth, self.endpoint, self.bucket_name)
 148	
 149	 # 生成文件路径
 150	 file_ext = file_obj.name.split('.')[-1] # 文件类型后缀
 151	 file_path = f'dreams/{time.strftime("%Y%m%d")}/{uuid.uuid4().hex}.{file_ext}'
 152	
 153	 # 上传文件
 154	 result = bucket.put_object(file_path, file_obj)
 155	
 156	 if result.status == 200:
 157	 return f'https://{self.bucket_name}.{self.endpoint.replace("https://", "")}/{file_path}'
 158	 else:
 159	 raise Exception("文件上传失败")
 160	
 161	 except Exception as e:
 162	 logger.error(f"文件上传失败: {str(e)}")
 163	 raise

 168	 为新用户创建bucket的类方法

 170	 """
 171	 try:
 172	 oss = cls(username=username, user_id=user_id)
 173	 return oss.ensure_bucket_exists()
 174	 except Exception as e:
 175	 logger.error(f"为用户{username or f'ID:{user_id}'}创建bucket失败: {str(e)}")

 21	## 核心组件
 22	
 23	### 1. WebSocket 消费者 (DreamImagesConsumer)
 24	
 25	梦境图片处理状态的WebSocket消费者，负责:
 26	
 27	- 处理客户端连接认证 (基于JWT)
 28	- 管理WebSocket连接生命周期
 29	- 处理客户端消息和请求
 30	- 发送图片处理状态更新通知
 31	- 维持心跳保持连接稳定
 32	
 33	```python
 34	# 消费者主要方法
 35	async def connect() # 处理连接请求与认证
 36	async def disconnect() # 处理连接断开
 37	async def receive_json() # 接收客户端JSON消息
 38	async def image_update() # 接收并转发图片更新事件
 39	```
 40	
 41	### 2. WebSocket 通知工具 (notifications.py)
 42	
 43	封装了向WebSocket通道发送消息的功能，支持:
 44	
 45	- 发送多种类型的状态更新
 46	- 失败重试机制
 47	- 异步到同步消息转换
 48	
 49	```python
 50	# 主要函数
 51	send_image_update(dream_id, image_urls, status, message) 
 52	```

 54	## 完整通信流程与技术原理
 55	
 56	### 1. 消息传递流程
 57	
 58	#### 从 Celery 任务到 Channel Layer
 59

 61	# 在 Celery 任务中调用
 62	send_image_update(dream_id=123, image_urls=[...], status='completed')

Path: apps/dream/websocket/consumers/dream_images.py
 1	"""
 2	梦境图片 WebSocket 消费者
 3	
 4	处理梦境图片上传状态的 WebSocket 连接和消息交换
 5	"""
 6	import json
 7	import logging
 8	import time
 9	import asyncio
 10	import urllib.parse
 11	from channels.generic.websocket import AsyncWebsocketConsumer
 12	from channels.db import database_sync_to_async
 13	from django.conf import settings
 14	import jwt
 15	from apps.dream.models import Dream, User, DreamImage
 16	
 17	logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
 18	
 19	
 20	class DreamImagesConsumer(AsyncWebsocketConsumer):
 21	 """
 22	 梦境图片上传状态 WebSocket 消费者
 23	 处理客户端与服务器之间的 WebSocket 连接，推送图片上传状态更新
 24	 """
 25	
 26	 async def connect(self):
 27	 """
 28	 建立 WebSocket 连接
 29	 """
 30	 self.dream_id = self.scope['url_route']['kwargs']['dream_id']
 31	 self.room_group_name = f'dream_images_{self.dream_id}'
 32	 self.authenticated = False
 33	 self.ping_task = None
 34	
 35	 # 从URL查询参数获取token
 36	 query_string = self.scope.get('query_string', b'').decode()
 37	 query_params = dict(urllib.parse.parse_qsl(query_string))
 38	 token = query_params.get('token')
 39	
 40	 # 认证检查
 41	 if not token or not await self.verify_token(token):
 42	 await self.close(code=4001)
 43	 return
 44	
 45	 # 客户端连接到 WebSocket 端点，将连接添加到特定通道组：self.room_group_name
 46	 await self.channel_layer.group_add(self.room_group_name, self.channel_name)
 47	 await self.accept()
 48	 
 49	 # 认证成功
 50	 self.authenticated = True
 51	 
 52	 # 发送连接成功消息并启动心跳任务
 53	 await self.send_json({
 54	 'type': 'connection_established',
 55	 'dream_id': self.dream_id,
 56	 'message': '连接已建立，等待图片处理状态更新'
 57	 })
 58	 
 59	 self.ping_task = asyncio.create_task(self.server_ping())
 60	
 61	 async def disconnect(self, close_code):
 62	 """
 63	 关闭 WebSocket 连接
 64	 """
 65	 # 停止心跳任务
 66	 if self.ping_task:
 67	 self.ping_task.cancel()
 68	 self.ping_task = None
 69	
 70	 # 将连接从通道组中移除
 71	 try:
 72	 await self.channel_layer.group_discard(self.room_group_name, self.channel_name)
 73	 except Exception:
 74	 pass
 75	
 76	 async def receive_json(self, content):
 77	 """
 78	 接收并处理 WebSocket 消息
 79	 """
 80	 if not self.authenticated:
 81	 return
 82	 
 83	 message_type = content.get('type')
 84	
 85	 # 处理不同类型的消息
 86	 try:
 87	 if message_type == 'ping':
 88	 await self.send_json({'type': 'pong', 'timestamp': time.time()})
 89	 elif message_type == 'request_status':
 90	 await self.handle_status_request()
 91	 else:
 92	 await self.send_json({'type': 'error', 'message': f'未知消息类型: {message_type}'})
 93	 except Exception as e:
 94	 if self.authenticated:
 95	 await self.send_json({'type': 'error', 'message': f'处理消息失败: {str(e)}'})
 96	
 97	 async def send_json(self, content):
 98	 """
 99	 向客户端发送 JSON 数据，带有错误处理
 100	 """
 101	 try:
 102	 await self.send(text_data=json.dumps(content))
 103	 return True
 104	 except Exception:
 105	 return False
 106	
 107	 async def handle_status_request(self):
 108	 """
 109	 处理状态请求，返回梦境的最新图片处理状态
 110	 """
 111	 if not self.authenticated:
 112	 return
 113	
 114	 try:
 115	 # 从数据库获取梦境图片
 116	 dream_images = await self.get_dream_images()
 117	 if not dream_images:
 118	 return
 119	
 120	 # 构建图片数据
 121	 images_data = [{'id': img.id, 'url': img.image_url, 'position': img.position} 
 122	 for img in dream_images]
 123	
 124	 # 发送状态响应
 125	 await self.send_json({
 126	 'type': 'image_update',
 127	 'dream_id': self.dream_id,
 128	 'images': images_data,
 129	 'status': 'completed',
 130	 'timestamp': time.time()
 131	 })
 132	 except Exception as e:
 133	 await self.send_json({
 134	 'type': 'error',
 135	 'message': f'获取状态失败: {str(e)}'
 136	 })
...
 171	
 172	 async def image_update(self, event):
 173	 """
 174	 接收图片更新事件并发送给客户端
 175	 """
 176	 if self.authenticated:
 177	 await self.send_json(event)
 178	
 179	 @database_sync_to_async
 180	 def get_dream_images(self):
 181	 """
 182	 获取梦境图片列表
 183	 """
 184	 dream = Dream.objects.filter(id=self.dream_id).first()
 185	 return list(DreamImage.objects.filter(dream=dream)) if dream else []

Path: apps/dream/websocket/README.md
 1	# WebSocket 模块
 2	
 3	本模块负责处理 WebSocket 连接和消息传递，用于提供实时图片处理状态更新功能。采用异步处理模式，确保高效的实时通信。
 4	
 5	## 目录结构
 6	
 7	```
 8	websocket/
 9	├── __init__.py # 包初始化文件
 10	├── consumers/ # WebSocket 消费者
 11	│ ├── __init__.py # 消费者包初始化文件，导出 DreamImagesConsumer
 12	│ └── dream_images.py # 梦境图片处理状态 WebSocket 消费者
 13	├── routing/ # WebSocket 路由
 14	│ ├── __init__.py # 路由包初始化文件，导出 websocket_urlpatterns
 15	│ └── urls.py # WebSocket URL 路由配置
 16	└── utils/ # WebSocket 工具函数
 17	 ├── __init__.py # 工具包初始化文件，导出通知函数
 18	 └── notifications.py # 发送 WebSocket 通知的工具函数
 19	```
 20	
 21	## 核心组件
 22	
 23	### 1. WebSocket 消费者 (DreamImagesConsumer)
 24	
 25	梦境图片处理状态的WebSocket消费者，负责:
 26	
 27	- 处理客户端连接认证 (基于JWT)
 28	- 管理WebSocket连接生命周期
 29	- 处理客户端消息和请求
 30	- 发送图片处理状态更新通知
 31	- 维持心跳保持连接稳定
 32	
 33	```python
 34	# 消费者主要方法
 35	async def connect() # 处理连接请求与认证
 36	async def disconnect() # 处理连接断开
 37	async def receive_json() # 接收客户端JSON消息
 38	async def image_update() # 接收并转发图片更新事件
 39	```
 40	
 41	### 2. WebSocket 通知工具 (notifications.py)
 42	
 43	封装了向WebSocket通道发送消息的功能，支持:
 44	
 45	- 发送多种类型的状态更新
 46	- 失败重试机制
 47	- 异步到同步消息转换
 48	
 49	```python
 50	# 主要函数
 51	send_image_update(dream_id, image_urls, status, message) 
 52	```
 53	
 54	## 完整通信流程与技术原理
 55	
 56	### 1. 消息传递流程
 57	
 58	#### 从 Celery 任务到 Channel Layer
 59	
 60	```python
 61	# 在 Celery 任务中调用
 62	send_image_update(dream_id=123, image_urls=[...], status='completed')
...
 73	group_name = f'dream_images_{dream_id}'
 74	async_to_sync(channel_layer.group_send)(group_name, message_data)
 75	```
 76	
 77	1. Celery 任务调用 `send_image_update`
 78	2. 消息准备包含特殊的 `type` 字段
 79	3. 使用 `async_to_sync` 在同步环境中调用异步方法
 80	4. 通过 `group_send` 将消息发送到指定通道组
 81	
 82	#### Channel Layer 内部消息路由
 83	
 84	Channel Layer（通常基于Redis实现）处理消息分发：
 85	
 86	1. 消息存储到 Redis 中
 87	2. 查询指定通道组的所有成员通道
 88	3. 将消息复制并发送到组内的每个通道队列
 89	
 90	#### 从 Channel Layer 到 Consumer
 91	
 92	```python
 93	# 自动调用的处理方法
 94	async def image_update(self, event):
 95	 """处理图片更新事件并发送到客户端"""
 96	 await self.send_json({
 97	 'type': 'image_update',
 98	 'dream_id': event['dream_id'],
 99	 'status': event['status'],
 100	 'images': event['images'],
 101	 'timestamp': event['timestamp'],
 102	 'message': event.get('message')
 103	 })
 104	```

 21	class DreamViewSet(viewsets.ModelViewSet):
 22	 """
 23	 一个用于处理梦境（Dream）资源的视图集。
 24	
 25	 提供了对梦境记录的 CRUD（创建、读取、更新、删除）操作，并集成了
 26	 复杂的业务逻辑，如图片处理、标签管理和分类。
 27	 """
 28	
 29	 # === ViewSet Configuration ===
 30	
 31	 # 权限和解析器配置
 32	 # 确保只有已认证的用户才能访问，并支持多种数据格式的请求
 33	 permission_classes = [permissions.IsAuthenticated]
 34	 parser_classes = [MultiPartParser, FormParser, JSONParser]
 35	
 36	 # === Core ViewSet Methods ===
 37	
 38	 def get_queryset(self):
 39	 """
 40	 获取当前认证用户的梦境记录。
 41	
 42	 为了优化性能，此方法使用了 select_related 和 prefetch_related
 43	 来减少数据库查询次数。
 44	 """
 45	 user = self.request.user
 46	 return (
 47	 Dream.objects.filter(user=user)
 48	 .select_related("user")
 49	 .prefetch_related(
 50	 "categories", "theme_tags", "character_tags", "location_tags", "images"
 51	 )
 52	 .order_by("-created_at")
 53	 )
 54	
 55	 def get_serializer_class(self):
 56	 """根据请求操作（Action）动态选择合适的序列化器。"""
 57	 if self.action in ["create", "update", "partial_update"]:
 58	 return DreamCreateSerializer
 59	 return DreamSerializer
 60	
 61	 # === Action Methods ===
 62	
 63	 def list(self, request, *args, **kwargs):
 64	 """处理获取梦境列表的请求，并在内容中插入图片。"""
 65	 queryset = self.get_queryset()
 66	 for dream in queryset:
 67	 dream.content = self._insert_images_to_content(dream)
 68	 serializer = self.get_serializer(queryset, many=True)
 69	 return Response(serializer.data)
 70	
 71	 def retrieve(self, request, *args, **kwargs):
 72	 """处理获取单个梦境详情的请求，并在内容中插入图片。"""
 73	 instance = self.get_object()
 74	 instance.content = self._insert_images_to_content(instance)
 75	 serializer = self.get_serializer(instance)
 76	 return Response(serializer.data)
...
 106	
 107	 # 准备并返回响应数据
 108	 dream.content = self._insert_images_to_content(dream)
 109	 serializer = DreamSerializer(dream)
 110	 response_data = serializer.data
 111	
 112	 # 如果有新图片上传，添加WebSocket通知信息
 113	 if request.FILES:
 114	 response_data["images_status"] = {
 115	 "status": "processing",
 116	 "websocket_url": f"/ws/dream-images/{dream.id}/",
 117	 "images": [],
 118	 }
 119	
 120	 return Response(response_data, status=status.HTTP_201_CREATED)
 121	
 122	 except Exception as e:
 123	 logger.error(f"创建梦境记录失败: {e}")
 124	 return Response(
 125	 {"detail": f"创建梦境记录失败: {e}"},
 126	 status=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST,
 127	 )
 128	
 129	 @transaction.atomic
 130	 def update(self, request, *args, **kwargs):
 131	 """
 132	 处理更新现有梦境的请求。
 133	
 134	 此操作是原子的。它会处理基本信息、分类、标签和图片的变更。
 135	 """
 136	 try:
 137	 instance = self.get_object()
 138	 form_data = self._extract_form_data(request)
 139	
 140	 # 更新基本信息
 141	 instance.title = form_data.get("title", instance.title)
 142	 instance.content = form_data.get("content", instance.content)
 143	 instance.save()
 144	
 145	 # 更新分类
 146	 instance.categories.clear()
 147	 self._process_categories(instance, form_data.get("categories", []))
 148	
 149	 # 更新标签
 150	 tags_data = form_data.get("tags", {})
 151	 for tag_type in ["theme", "character", "location"]:
 152	 current_tags = list(getattr(instance, f"{tag_type}_tags").all())
 153	 getattr(instance, f"{tag_type}_tags").clear()
 154	 self._process_tags(instance, tags_data.get(tag_type, []), tag_type)
 155	 self._cleanup_unused_tags(current_tags)
 156	
 157	 # 处理图片（删除旧图片，添加新图片）
 158	 self._process_image_changes(instance, form_data, request)
 159	
 160	 # 准备并返回响应数据
 161	 instance.content = self._insert_images_to_content(instance)
 162	 serializer = DreamSerializer(instance)
 163	 response_data = serializer.data
 164	
 165	 # 如果有新图片上传，添加WebSocket通知信息
 166	 if request.FILES:
 167	 response_data["images_status"] = {
 168	 "status": "processing",
 169	 "websocket_url": f"/ws/dream-images/{instance.id}/",
 170	 "message": "正在处理新上传的图片，稍后将自动更新",
 171	 "images": [],
 172	 }
 173	
 174	 return Response(response_data)
 175	
 176	 except Exception as e:
 177	 logger.error(f"更新梦境记录失败: {e}")
 178	 return Response(
 179	 {"detail": f"更新梦境记录失败: {e}"},
 180	 status=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST,
 181	 )
 182	
 183	 def destroy(self, request, *args, **kwargs):
 184	 """
 185	 处理删除梦境的请求。
 186	
 187	 在删除梦境记录前，会先启动一个后台任务来删除关联的云存储（OSS）图片。
 188	 """
 189	 try:
 190	 instance = self.get_object()
 191	 image_queryset = DreamImage.objects.filter(dream=instance)
 192	 
 193	 if image_queryset.exists():
 194	 image_details = [
 195	 {"id": image.id, "url": image.image_url} for image in image_queryset
 196	 ]
 197	 delete_images(instance.id, image_details, request.user.username, request.user.id)
 198	 logger.info(f"已将{len(image_details)}个图片发送到删除队列")
 199	
 200	 return super().destroy(request, *args, **kwargs)
 201	
 202	 except Exception as e:
 203	 logger.error(f"删除梦境记录失败: {e}")
 204	 return Response(
 205	 {"error": f"删除梦境记录失败: {e}"},
 206	 status=status.HTTP_500_INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR,
 207	 )

 327	
 328	 def _process_image_uploads(self, dream, request):
 329	 """
 330	 准备并触发一个后台任务来处理新上传的图片。
 331	 """
 332	 try:
 333	 image_files, positions = [], []
 334	 
 335	 # 从请求中收集图片文件和元数据
 336	 for key in request.FILES:
 337	 if key.startswith("imageFile_"):
 338	 index = key.split("_")[1]
 339	 file = request.FILES[key]
 340	 
 341	 # 解析元数据以获取图片位置
 342	 metadata_str = request.data.get(f"imageMetadata_{index}", "{}")
 343	 metadata = json.loads(metadata_str) if isinstance(metadata_str, str) else metadata_str
 344	 
 345	 image_files.append({"name": file.name, "data": file.read()})
 346	 positions.append(metadata.get("position", 0))
 347	
 348	 # 如果有图片，则发送到后台任务队列
 349	 if image_files:
 350	 upload_images(dream.id, image_files, positions)
 351	 logger.info(f"已将 {len(image_files)} 个新图片发送到处理队列")
 352	
 353	 except Exception as e:
 354	 logger.error(f"图片上传任务准备失败: {e}")
 355	 raise ValidationError(f"图片上传任务准备失败: {e}")

 36	# 梦境序列化器
 37	class DreamSerializer(serializers.ModelSerializer):

 39	 categories = DreamCategorySerializer(many=True, read_only=True)

 54	 }
 55	
 56	 def get_tags(self, obj):
 57	 """将不同类型的标签组织成嵌套结构，只返回标签名"""
 58	 return {
 59	 'theme': [tag.name for tag in obj.theme_tags.all()],

 61	 'location': [tag.name for tag in obj.location_tags.all()],

 30	 # 获取梦境记录
 31	 dream = Dream.objects.get(id=dream_id)
 32	
 33	 # 创建OSS实例并确保存储桶存在
 34	 oss = OSS(username=dream.user.username, user_id=dream.user.id)
 35	 oss.ensure_bucket_exists()
 36	
 37	 # 解码图片数据并通知处理开始
 38	 image_data_list = [(base64.b64decode(file['data']), file['name'], position) 
 39	 for file, position in zip(encoded_files, positions)]
 40	 send_image_update(dream_id, [], status='processing')
 41	
 42	 # 直接上传图片
 43	 uploaded_images = []
 44	 for image_data, filename, position in image_data_list:
 45	 # 准备上传 - 使用确定性文件名以保证幂等性
 46	 # 格式: {dream_id}_{position}_{original_filename}
 47	 unique_filename = f"{dream_id}_{position}_{filename}"
 48	 file_obj = io.BytesIO(image_data)
 49	 file_obj.name = unique_filename
 50	 
 51	 # 上传到OSS（如果文件已存在，会被覆盖，这是幂等行为）
 52	 image_url = oss.upload_file(file_obj)
 53	 uploaded_images.append((image_url, position))
 54	
 55	 # 创建数据库记录并发送通知
 56	 created_images_info = []
 57	 with transaction.atomic():
 58	 for url, position in uploaded_images:
 59	 # 使用 get_or_create 保证幂等性
 60	 # 如果记录已存在，则不会创建新的，避免了重复
 61	 # 注意: 这假设 (dream, position) 组合在数据库中是唯一的
 62	 image, created = DreamImage.objects.get_or_create(
 63	 dream=dream,
 64	 position=position,
 65	 defaults={'image_url': url}
 66	 )
 67	 
 68	 # 如果不是新创建的，可能URL因某种原因需要更新
 69	 if not created and image.image_url != url:
 70	 image.image_url = url
 71	 image.save()
 72	
 73	 created_images_info.append({
 74	 "id": image.id,
 75	 "url": image.image_url,
 76	 "position": image.position
 77	 })
 78	
 79	 # 发送完成通知
 80	 send_image_update(dream_id, created_images_info, status='completed')
 81	 
 82	 # 返回所有图片URL
 83	 return [url for url, _ in uploaded_images]

 126	const DreamDetail = () => {
 127	 const { id } = useParams();
 128	 const navigate = useNavigate();
 129	 const { isAuthenticated, isLoading: authLoading, user } = useAuth();
 130	 const { dreams, isLoading: dreamsLoading, getDreamById, fetchDreams, addOrUpdateDream } = useDreams();
 131	 const [dream, setDream] = useState(null);
 132	 const [error, setError] = useState(null);
 133	 const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
 134	 const socketRef = useRef(null);
 135	 const updateContentDebounceRef = useRef(null);
 136	
 137	 // 处理图片更新
 138	 const processImagesUpdate = useCallback((images) => {
 139	 if (!images || images.length === 0) return false;
 140	
 141	 const dreamData = getDreamById(id) || dream;
 142	 if (!dreamData) return false;
 143	
 144	 const updateContent = (dreamData) => {
 145	 if (!dreamData) return false;
 146	 try {
 147	 const updatedDream = { ...dreamData };
 148	 const sortedImages = [...images].sort((a, b) => a.position - b.position);
 149	 let content = updatedDream.content || "";
 150	 let offset = 0;
 151	
 152	 for (const image of sortedImages) {
 153	 if (!image.url) continue;
 154	 const position = image.position + offset;
 155	 const imageMarkdown = `![梦境图片](${image.url})`;
 156	
 157	 if (position <= content.length) {
 158	 content = content.substring(0, position) + imageMarkdown + content.substring(position);
 159	 offset += imageMarkdown.length;
 160	 } else {
 161	 const newLinePrefix = !content.endsWith('\n\n') ? (content.endsWith('\n') ? '\n' : '\n\n') : '';
 162	 content += newLinePrefix + imageMarkdown;
 163	 }
 164	 }
 165	
 166	 updatedDream.content = content;
 167	 setDream(updatedDream);
 168	 addOrUpdateDream(updatedDream);
 169	 return true;
 170	 } catch {
 171	 return false;
 172	 }
 173	 };
 174	
 175	 return updateContent(dreamData);
 176	 }, [dream, id, getDreamById, fetchDreams, addOrUpdateDream]);
 177	
 178	 // WebSocket消息处理
 179	 const handleImageUpdate = useCallback((data) => {
 180	 if (data.dream_id !== parseInt(id)) return;
 181	
 182	 const latestDream = getDreamById(id);
 183	 if (latestDream && (!dream || dream.id !== latestDream.id)) {
 184	 setDream(latestDream);
 185	 }
 186	
 187	 const statusHandlers = {
 188	 processing: () => {
 189	 if (!socketRef.current?.isProcessingNotified) {
 190	 notification.info(`图片处理中...`);
 191	 if (socketRef.current) socketRef.current.isProcessingNotified = true;
 192	 }
 193	 },
 194	 completed: () => {
 195	 if (socketRef.current) socketRef.current.isProcessingNotified = false;
 196	 if (data.images?.length > 0) {
 197	 if (updateContentDebounceRef.current) clearTimeout(updateContentDebounceRef.current);
 198	 updateContentDebounceRef.current = setTimeout(() => {
 199	 const success = processImagesUpdate(data.images);
 200	 if (success) {
 201	 notification.success('图片处理完成！已成功添加到您的梦境记录中');
 202	 }
 203	 // 图片处理完成后延迟关闭WebSocket连接
 204	 setTimeout(() => {
 205	 if (socketRef.current) {
 206	 socketRef.current.unmount();
 207	 socketRef.current = null;
 208	 }
 209	 }, 1000);
 210	 }, 500);
 211	 } else {
 212	 notification.success('图片处理完成');
 213	 // 延迟关闭WebSocket连接
 214	 setTimeout(() => {
 215	 if (socketRef.current) {
 216	 socketRef.current.unmount();
 217	 socketRef.current = null;
 218	 }
 219	 }, 1000);
 220	 }
 221	 },
 222	 failed: () => {
 223	 if (socketRef.current) socketRef.current.isProcessingNotified = false;
 224	 notification.error(data.message || '图片处理失败');
 225	 // 处理失败后也延迟关闭WebSocket连接
 226	 setTimeout(() => {
 227	 if (socketRef.current) {
 228	 socketRef.current.unmount();
 229	 socketRef.current = null;
 230	 }
 231	 }, 1000);
 232	 },
 233	 delete_processing: () => notification.info(data.message || `正在删除图片...`),
 234	 delete_completed: () => notification.success(data.message || '图片已成功删除'),
 235	 delete_failed: () => notification.error(data.message || '删除图片时出现错误')
 236	 };
 237	
 238	 const handler = statusHandlers[data.status];
 239	 if (handler) handler();
 240	 }, [id, getDreamById, dream, setDream, processImagesUpdate]);
 241	
 242	 // Effect 1: Fetch and set dream data
 243	 useEffect(() => {
 244	 if (authLoading) return;
 245	 if (!isAuthenticated) {
 246	 navigate('/login', { state: { from: `/dreams/${id}` } });
 247	 return;
 248	 }
 249	
 250	 const dreamData = getDreamById(id);
 251	 if (dreamData) {
 252	 setDream(dreamData);
 253	 setLoading(false);
 254	 setError(null);
 255	 } else if (!dreamsLoading) {
 256	 fetchDreams(); // Trigger fetch if not already loading
 257	 }
 258	 }, [id, isAuthenticated, authLoading, dreams, dreamsLoading, getDreamById, fetchDreams, navigate]);
 259	
 260	 // Effect 2: Manage WebSocket connection
 261	 useEffect(() => {
 262	 // Conditions to establish connection
 263	 const canConnect = dream && isAuthenticated && dream.id === parseInt(id, 10);
 264	 if (!canConnect) {
 265	 return;
 266	 }
 267	
 268	 // 建立WebSocket连接的条件：
 269	 // 1. 梦境内容包含处理中的占位符
 270	 // 2. 或者梦境有图片处理状态且状态为processing
 271	 const needsWebSocketConnection =
 272	 dream.content?.includes('![正在处理图片...]') ||
 273	 (dream.images_status && dream.images_status.status === 'processing');
 274	
 275	 if (needsWebSocketConnection && !socketRef.current) {
 276	 const token = tokenManager.getAccessToken();
 277	 if (token && tokenManager.isAccessTokenValid()) {
 278	 socketRef.current = new DreamImageWebSocketClient(dream.id, token, handleImageUpdate);
 279	 socketRef.current.connect();
 280	 }
 281	 }
 282	
 283	 // Cleanup function for this effect
 284	 return () => {
 285	 // 只有在组件卸载或ID变化时才清理WebSocket
 286	 if (updateContentDebounceRef.current) {
 287	 clearTimeout(updateContentDebounceRef.current);
 288	 }
 289	 };
 290	 }, [dream?.id, dream?.images_status?.status, dream?.content, isAuthenticated, id, handleImageUpdate]);
 291	
 292	 // 组件卸载时清理WebSocket
 293	 useEffect(() => {
 294	 return () => {
 295	 if (socketRef.current) {
 296	 socketRef.current.unmount();
 297	 socketRef.current = null;
 298	 }
 299	 };
 300	 }, []);
 301

 303	 if (error) {

 308	 <Moon className="h-8 w-8 text-purple-400" />

 335	 >
 336	 重新获取数据

 339	 </div>

 1	import notification from "@/utils/notification";
 2	
 3	/**
 4	 * 梦境图片WebSocket客户端 - 接收图片处理状态更新
 5	 */
 6	class DreamImageWebSocketClient {
 7	 /**
 8	 * 初始化WebSocket客户端
 9	 * @param {string} dreamId - 梦境ID
 10	 * @param {string} authToken - JWT认证令牌
 11	 * @param {Function} onImageUpdate - 图片更新回调函数
 12	 */
 13	 constructor(dreamId, authToken, onImageUpdate) {
 14	 // 基本属性设置
 15	 this.dreamId = dreamId;
 16	 this.authToken = authToken;
 17	 this.onImageUpdate = onImageUpdate;
 18	 this.socket = null;
 19	 this.reconnectAttempts = 0;
 20	 this.maxReconnectAttempts = 5;
 21	 this.pingInterval = null;
 22	 this.isComponentMounted = true;
 23	 this.manualClose = false; // 标记是否为手动关闭
 24	 }
 25	
 26	 /**
 27	 * 构建WebSocket URL
 28	 * @param {string} token - 认证令牌
 29	 * @returns {string} WebSocket URL
 30	 */
 31	 buildWebSocketUrl(token) {
 32	 // 清理令牌，移除可能的Bearer前缀
 33	 const cleanToken = token.replace(/^Bearer\s+/i, '').trim();
 34	
 35	 // 根据环境构建正确的WebSocket URL
 36	 const isDevMode = import.meta.env.DEV;
 37	 const protocol = window.location.protocol === 'https:' ? 'wss:' : 'ws:';
 38	
 39	 if (isDevMode) {
 40	 // 开发环境：直接连接到Django开发服务器
 41	 return `${protocol}//localhost:8000/ws/dream-images/${this.dreamId}/?token=${encodeURIComponent(cleanToken)}`;
 42	 } else {
 43	 // 生产环境：使用相对路径
 44	 const host = window.location.host;
 45	 return `${protocol}//${host}/ws/dream-images/${this.dreamId}/?token=${encodeURIComponent(cleanToken)}`;
 46	 }
 47	 }
 48	
 49	 /**
 50	 * 连接到WebSocket服务器
 51	 */
 52	 connect() {
 53	 // 避免重复连接或无效条件
 54	 if (!this.isComponentMounted || this.socket || !window.WebSocket) {
 55	 if (!window.WebSocket) notification.error('您的浏览器不支持实时图片更新');
 56	 return;
 57	 }
 58	
 59	 // 验证令牌
 60	 if (!this.authToken || this.authToken.trim() === '') {
 61	 return;
 62	 }
 63	
 64	 try {
 65	 // 构建WebSocket URL
 66	 const wsUrl = this.buildWebSocketUrl(this.authToken);
 67	
 68	 this.socket = new WebSocket(wsUrl);
 69	
 70	 // 设置事件处理器
 71	 this.socket.onopen = () => {
 72	 this.reconnectAttempts = 0;
 73	 };
 74	
 75	 this.socket.onmessage = (event) => {
 76	 if (!this.isComponentMounted) return;
 77	
 78	 try {
 79	 const data = JSON.parse(event.data);
 80	
 81	 switch (data.type) {
 82	 case 'connection_established':
 83	 this.isAuthenticated = true;
 84	 this.startPingInterval();
 85	 this.sendJSON({ type: 'request_status', dream_id: this.dreamId });
 86	 break;
 87	
 88	 case 'image_update':
 89	 this.onImageUpdate?.(data);
 90	 break;
 91	
 92	 case 'ping':
 93	 this.sendJSON({ type: 'pong', timestamp: Date.now() });
 94	 break;
 95	
 96	 case 'error':
 97	 break;
 98	 }
 99	 } catch (error) {
 100	 // 静默处理解析错误
 101	 }
 102	 };
 103	
 104	 this.socket.onclose = (event) => {
 105	 this.cleanup();
 106	 // 只在非手动关闭时尝试重连
 107	 if (!this.manualClose) {
 108	 this.scheduleReconnect();
 109	 }
 110	 };
 111	
 112	 this.socket.onerror = (error) => {
 113	 // 静默处理连接错误
 114	 };
 115	 } catch (error) {
 116	 this.scheduleReconnect();
 117	 }
 118	 }
 119	
 120	 /**
 121	 * 安排重新连接
 122	 */
 123	 scheduleReconnect() {
 124	 if (!this.isComponentMounted || this.reconnectAttempts >= this.maxReconnectAttempts) {
 125	 return;
 126	 }
 127	
 128	 this.reconnectAttempts++;
 129	 const delay = Math.min(2000 * Math.pow(1.5, this.reconnectAttempts - 1), 10000);
 130	
 131	 setTimeout(() => {
 132	 if (this.isComponentMounted) {
 133	 this.connect();
 134	 }
 135	 }, delay);
 136	 }
 137	
 138	 /**
 139	 * 启动心跳检测
 140	 */
 141	 startPingInterval() {
 142	 this.stopPingInterval();
 143	 this.pingInterval = setInterval(() => {
 144	 if (this.socket?.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN) {
 145	 this.sendJSON({ type: 'ping', timestamp: Date.now() });
 146	 } else {
 147	 this.stopPingInterval();
 148	 }
 149	 }, 10000);
 150	 }
 151	
 152	 /**
 153	 * 停止心跳检测
 154	 */
 155	 stopPingInterval() {
 156	 if (this.pingInterval) {
 157	 clearInterval(this.pingInterval);
 158	 this.pingInterval = null;
 159	 }
 160	 }
 161	
 162	 /**
 163	 * 发送JSON数据
 164	 */
 165	 sendJSON(data) {
 166	 if (this.socket?.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN) {
 167	 try {
 168	 this.socket.send(JSON.stringify(data));
 169	 return true;
 170	 } catch (error) {
 171	 return false;
 172	 }
 173	 }
 174	 return false;
 175	 }
 176	
 177	 /**
 178	 * 清理资源
 179	 */
 180	 cleanup() {
 181	 this.isAuthenticated = false;
 182	 this.stopPingInterval();
 183	 }
 184	
 185	 /**
 186	 * 关闭WebSocket连接
 187	 */
 188	 close() {
 189	 this.manualClose = true; // 标记为手动关闭
 190	 this.cleanup();
 191	 if (this.socket) {
 192	 try {
 193	 this.socket.close(1000, "客户端主动关闭");
 194	 } catch (error) {
 195	 // 静默处理关闭错误
 196	 }
 197	 this.socket = null;
 198	 }
 199	 }
 200	
 201	 /**
 202	 * 组件卸载时调用，清理资源
 203	 */
 204	 unmount() {
 205	 this.isComponentMounted = false;
 206	 this.close();
 207	 }
 208	}
 209	
 210	export default DreamImageWebSocketClient;

 236	 def _insert_images_to_content(self, dream):
 237	 """将梦境关联的图片URL按位置插入到其内容中，生成最终的Markdown文本。"""
 238	 content = dream.content
 239	 offset = 0
 240	 # 按位置升序排列图片
 241	 for image_obj in dream.images.all().order_by("position"):
 242	 position = image_obj.position + offset
 243	 markdown_image = f"![图片]({image_obj.image_url})"
 244	 content = content[:position] + markdown_image + content[position:]
 245	 offset += len(markdown_image)
 246	 return content

 236	 def _insert_images_to_content(self, dream):
 237	 """将梦境关联的图片URL按位置插入到其内容中，生成最终的Markdown文本。"""
 238	 content = dream.content
 239	 offset = 0
 240	 # 按位置升序排列图片
 241	 for image_obj in dream.images.all().order_by("position"):
 242	 position = image_obj.position + offset
 243	 markdown_image = f"![图片]({image_obj.image_url})"
 244	 content = content[:position] + markdown_image + content[position:]
 245	 offset += len(markdown_image)
 246	 return content

 14	def send_image_update(dream_id, image_urls=None, status='completed', message=None):
 15	 """
 16	 发送图片处理状态更新到 WebSocket 通道
 17	 
 18	 Args:
 19	 dream_id: 梦境ID
 20	 image_urls: 处理完成的图片URL列表 [{"url": "http://...", "position": 0}, ...]
 21	 status: 处理状态 (processing, completed, failed, delete_processing, delete_completed, delete_failed)
 22	 message: 状态消息
 23	 
 24	 Returns:
 25	 bool: 发送是否成功
 26	 """
 27	 if not dream_id:
 28	 return False
 29	 
 30	 try:
 31	 # 获取 Django Channels 的通道层实例。通道层是 Channels 的核心组件，负责消息的路由和传递。
 32	 channel_layer = get_channel_layer()
 33	 if not channel_layer:
 34	 return False
 35	 
 36	 # 准备消息数据
 37	 message_data = {
 38	 'type': 'image_update', # 消息类型与 consumer 方法名匹配
 39	 'dream_id': dream_id,
 40	 'status': status,
 41	 'images': image_urls or [],
 42	 'timestamp': time.time()
 43	 }
 44	 
 45	 # 如果提供了消息文本，添加到数据中
 46	 if message:
 47	 message_data['message'] = message
 48	 
 49	 # 重试逻辑
 50	 max_retries = getattr(settings, 'WEBSOCKET_MAX_RETRIES', 3)
 51	 retry_delay = getattr(settings, 'WEBSOCKET_RETRY_DELAY', 1)
 52	 
 53	 # 发送消息到指定的通道组
 54	 group_name = f'dream_images_{dream_id}'
 55	 
 56	 for attempt in range(max_retries):
 57	 try:
 58	 # 消息通过 channel_layer.group_send 发送到通道组
 59	 # 由于 send_image_update 函数在同步环境（如 Celery 任务或视图函数）中调用，而 Channels 的通道层操作是异步的，所以需要这个转换器将异步函数转换为同步函数
 60	 async_to_sync(channel_layer.group_send)(group_name, message_data)
 61	 return True
 62	 except Exception:
 63	 if attempt < max_retries - 1:
 64	 time.sleep(retry_delay)
 65	 
 66	 return False
 67	 
 68	 except Exception:
 69	 return False
 70

Path: apps/dream/websocket/consumers/dream_images.py
 1	"""
 2	梦境图片 WebSocket 消费者
 3	
 4	处理梦境图片上传状态的 WebSocket 连接和消息交换
 5	"""
 6	import json
 7	import logging
 8	import time
 9	import asyncio
 10	import urllib.parse
 11	from channels.generic.websocket import AsyncWebsocketConsumer
 12	from channels.db import database_sync_to_async
 13	from django.conf import settings
 14	import jwt
 15	from apps.dream.models import Dream, User, DreamImage
 16	
 17	logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
 18	
 19	
 20	class DreamImagesConsumer(AsyncWebsocketConsumer):
 21	 """
 22	 梦境图片上传状态 WebSocket 消费者
 23	 处理客户端与服务器之间的 WebSocket 连接，推送图片上传状态更新
 24	 """
 25	
 26	 async def connect(self):
 27	 """
 28	 建立 WebSocket 连接
 29	 """
 30	 self.dream_id = self.scope['url_route']['kwargs']['dream_id']
 31	 self.room_group_name = f'dream_images_{self.dream_id}'
 32	 self.authenticated = False
 33	 self.ping_task = None
 34	
 35	 # 从URL查询参数获取token
 36	 query_string = self.scope.get('query_string', b'').decode()
 37	 query_params = dict(urllib.parse.parse_qsl(query_string))
 38	 token = query_params.get('token')
 39	
 40	 # 认证检查
 41	 if not token or not await self.verify_token(token):
 42	 await self.close(code=4001)
 43	 return
 44	
 45	 # 客户端连接到 WebSocket 端点，将连接添加到特定通道组：self.room_group_name
 46	 await self.channel_layer.group_add(self.room_group_name, self.channel_name)
 47	 await self.accept()
 48	 
 49	 # 认证成功
 50	 self.authenticated = True
 51	 
 52	 # 发送连接成功消息并启动心跳任务
 53	 await self.send_json({
 54	 'type': 'connection_established',
 55	 'dream_id': self.dream_id,
 56	 'message': '连接已建立，等待图片处理状态更新'
 57	 })
 58	 
 59	 self.ping_task = asyncio.create_task(self.server_ping())
 60	
 61	 async def disconnect(self, close_code):
 62	 """
 63	 关闭 WebSocket 连接
 64	 """
 65	 # 停止心跳任务
 66	 if self.ping_task:
 67	 self.ping_task.cancel()
 68	 self.ping_task = None
 69	
 70	 # 将连接从通道组中移除
 71	 try:
 72	 await self.channel_layer.group_discard(self.room_group_name, self.channel_name)
 73	 except Exception:
 74	 pass
 75	
 76	 async def receive_json(self, content):
 77	 """
 78	 接收并处理 WebSocket 消息
 79	 """
 80	 if not self.authenticated:
 81	 return
 82	 
 83	 message_type = content.get('type')
 84	
 85	 # 处理不同类型的消息
 86	 try:
 87	 if message_type == 'ping':
 88	 await self.send_json({'type': 'pong', 'timestamp': time.time()})
 89	 elif message_type == 'request_status':
 90	 await self.handle_status_request()
 91	 else:
 92	 await self.send_json({'type': 'error', 'message': f'未知消息类型: {message_type}'})
 93	 except Exception as e:
 94	 if self.authenticated:
 95	 await self.send_json({'type': 'error', 'message': f'处理消息失败: {str(e)}'})
 96	
 97	 async def send_json(self, content):
 98	 """
 99	 向客户端发送 JSON 数据，带有错误处理
 100	 """
 101	 try:
 102	 await self.send(text_data=json.dumps(content))
 103	 return True
 104	 except Exception:
 105	 return False
 106	
 107	 async def handle_status_request(self):
 108	 """
 109	 处理状态请求，返回梦境的最新图片处理状态
 110	 """
 111	 if not self.authenticated:
 112	 return
 113	
 114	 try:
 115	 # 从数据库获取梦境图片
 116	 dream_images = await self.get_dream_images()
 117	
 118	 # 构建图片数据
 119	 images_data = [{'id': img.id, 'url': img.image_url, 'position': img.position}
 120	 for img in dream_images] if dream_images else []
 121	
 122	 # 发送状态响应 - 即使没有图片也要发送状态
 123	 await self.send_json({
 124	 'type': 'image_update',
 125	 'dream_id': self.dream_id,
 126	 'images': images_data,
 127	 'status': 'completed' if dream_images else 'processing',
 128	 'timestamp': time.time(),
 129	 'message': '已获取最新状态' if dream_images else '图片处理中，请稍候...'
 130	 })
 131	 except Exception as e:
 132	 await self.send_json({
 133	 'type': 'error',
 134	 'message': f'获取状态失败: {str(e)}'
 135	 })
 136	
 137	 async def verify_token(self, token):
 138	 """
 139	 验证JWT令牌
 140	 """
 141	 try:
 142	 # 解码令牌
 143	 payload = jwt.decode(
 144	 token,
 145	 settings.SIMPLE_JWT['SIGNING_KEY'],
 146	 algorithms=[settings.SIMPLE_JWT['ALGORITHM']]
 147	 )
 148	 user_id = payload['user_id']
 149	
 150	 # 验证用户和梦境
 151	 user = await database_sync_to_async(lambda: User.objects.filter(id=user_id).first())()
 152	 dream = await database_sync_to_async(lambda: Dream.objects.filter(id=self.dream_id).first())()
 153	 
 154	 return user and dream and dream.user_id == user_id
 155	 except Exception:
 156	 return False
 157	
 158	 async def server_ping(self):
 159	 """
 160	 服务器发送定期心跳以保持连接活跃
 161	 """
 162	 try:
 163	 while True:
 164	 await asyncio.sleep(15)
 165	 await self.send_json({'type': 'ping', 'timestamp': time.time()})
 166	 except asyncio.CancelledError:
 167	 pass
 168	 except Exception:
 169	 pass
 170	
 171	 async def image_update(self, event):
 172	 """

Path: apps/dream/websocket/README.md
 1	# WebSocket 模块
 2	
 3	本模块负责处理 WebSocket 连接和消息传递，用于提供实时图片处理状态更新功能。采用异步处理模式，确保高效的实时通信。
 4	
 5	## 目录结构
 6	
 7	```
 8	websocket/
 9	├── __init__.py # 包初始化文件
 10	├── consumers/ # WebSocket 消费者
 11	│ ├── __init__.py # 消费者包初始化文件，导出 DreamImagesConsumer
 12	│ └── dream_images.py # 梦境图片处理状态 WebSocket 消费者
 13	├── routing/ # WebSocket 路由
 14	│ ├── __init__.py # 路由包初始化文件，导出 websocket_urlpatterns
 15	│ └── urls.py # WebSocket URL 路由配置
 16	└── utils/ # WebSocket 工具函数
 17	 ├── __init__.py # 工具包初始化文件，导出通知函数
 18	 └── notifications.py # 发送 WebSocket 通知的工具函数
 19	```
 20	
 21	## 核心组件
 22	
 23	### 1. WebSocket 消费者 (DreamImagesConsumer)
 24	
 25	梦境图片处理状态的WebSocket消费者，负责:
 26	
 27	- 处理客户端连接认证 (基于JWT)
 28	- 管理WebSocket连接生命周期
 29	- 处理客户端消息和请求
 30	- 发送图片处理状态更新通知
 31	- 维持心跳保持连接稳定
 32	
 33	```python
 34	# 消费者主要方法
 35	async def connect() # 处理连接请求与认证
 36	async def disconnect() # 处理连接断开
 37	async def receive_json() # 接收客户端JSON消息
 38	async def image_update() # 接收并转发图片更新事件
 39	```
 40	
 41	### 2. WebSocket 通知工具 (notifications.py)
 42	
 43	封装了向WebSocket通道发送消息的功能，支持:
 44	
 45	- 发送多种类型的状态更新
 46	- 失败重试机制
 47	- 异步到同步消息转换
 48	
 49	```python
 50	# 主要函数
 51	send_image_update(dream_id, image_urls, status, message) 
 52	```
 53	
 54	## 完整通信流程与技术原理
 55	
 56	### 1. 消息传递流程
 57	
 58	#### 从 Celery 任务到 Channel Layer
 59	
 60	```python
 61	# 在 Celery 任务中调用
 62	send_image_update(dream_id=123, image_urls=[...], status='completed')
...

 48	
 49	 /**
 50	 * 连接到WebSocket服务器
 51	 */
 52	 connect() {
 53	 // 避免重复连接或无效条件
 54	 if (!this.isComponentMounted || this.socket || !window.WebSocket) {
 55	 if (!window.WebSocket) notification.error('您的浏览器不支持实时图片更新');
 56	 return;
 57	 }
 58	
 59	 // 验证令牌
 60	 if (!this.authToken || this.authToken.trim() === '') {
 61	 return;
 62	 }
 63	
 64	 try {
 65	 // 构建WebSocket URL
 66	 const wsUrl = this.buildWebSocketUrl(this.authToken);
 67	
 68	 this.socket = new WebSocket(wsUrl);
 69	
 70	 // 设置事件处理器
 71	 this.socket.onopen = () => {
 72	 this.reconnectAttempts = 0;
 73	 };
 74	
 75	 this.socket.onmessage = (event) => {
 76	 if (!this.isComponentMounted) return;
 77	
 78	 try {
 79	 const data = JSON.parse(event.data);
 80	
 81	 switch (data.type) {
 82	 case 'connection_established':
 83	 this.isAuthenticated = true;
 84	 this.startPingInterval();
 85	 // 连接建立后立即请求当前状态
 86	 this.sendJSON({ type: 'request_status', dream_id: this.dreamId });
 87	 break;
 88	
 89	 case 'image_update':
 90	 // 确保回调函数存在且组件仍然挂载
 91	 if (this.onImageUpdate && this.isComponentMounted) {
 92	 this.onImageUpdate(data);
 93	 }
 94	 break;
 95	
 96	 case 'ping':
 97	 this.sendJSON({ type: 'pong', timestamp: Date.now() });
 98	 break;
 99	
 100	 case 'pong':
 101	 // 处理服务器的pong响应
 102	 break;
 103	
 104	 case 'error':
 105	 // 静默处理错误消息
 106	 break;
 107	 }
 108	 } catch (error) {
 109	 // 静默处理解析错误
 110	 }
 111	 };
 112	
 113	 this.socket.onclose = (event) => {
 114	 this.cleanup();
 115	 // 只在非手动关闭时尝试重连
 116	 if (!this.manualClose) {
 117	 this.scheduleReconnect();
 118	 }
 119	 };

Path: apps/dream/websocket/utils/notifications.py
 1	"""
 2	WebSocket 通知工具函数
 3	
 4	提供发送 WebSocket 消息的功能，主要用于异步任务完成后通知前端
 5	"""
 6	import logging
 7	import time
 8	from asgiref.sync import async_to_sync
 9	from channels.layers import get_channel_layer
 10	from django.conf import settings
 11	
 12	logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
 13	
 14	def send_image_update(dream_id, image_urls=None, status='completed', message=None):
 15	 """
 16	 发送图片处理状态更新到 WebSocket 通道
 17	 
 18	 Args:
 19	 dream_id: 梦境ID
 20	 image_urls: 处理完成的图片URL列表 [{"url": "http://...", "position": 0}, ...]
 21	 status: 处理状态 (processing, completed, failed, delete_processing, delete_completed, delete_failed)
 22	 message: 状态消息
 23	 
 24	 Returns:
 25	 bool: 发送是否成功
 26	 """
 27	 if not dream_id:
 28	 return False
 29	 
 30	 try:
 31	 # 获取 Django Channels 的通道层实例。通道层是 Channels 的核心组件，负责消息的路由和传递。
 32	 channel_layer = get_channel_layer()
 33	 if not channel_layer:
 34	 return False
 35	 
 36	 # 准备消息数据
 37	 message_data = {
 38	 'type': 'image_update', # 消息类型与 consumer 方法名匹配
 39	 'dream_id': dream_id,
 40	 'status': status,
 41	 'images': image_urls or [],
 42	 'timestamp': time.time()
 43	 }
 44	 
 45	 # 如果提供了消息文本，添加到数据中
 46	 if message:
 47	 message_data['message'] = message
 48	 
 49	 # 重试逻辑
 50	 max_retries = getattr(settings, 'WEBSOCKET_MAX_RETRIES', 3)
 51	 retry_delay = getattr(settings, 'WEBSOCKET_RETRY_DELAY', 1)
 52	 
 53	 # 发送消息到指定的通道组
 54	 group_name = f'dream_images_{dream_id}'
 55	 
 56	 for attempt in range(max_retries):
 57	 try:
 58	 # 消息通过 channel_layer.group_send 发送到通道组
 59	 # 由于 send_image_update 函数在同步环境（如 Celery 任务或视图函数）中调用，而 Channels 的通道层操作是异步的，所以需要这个转换器将异步函数转换为同步函数
 60	 async_to_sync(channel_layer.group_send)(group_name, message_data)
 61	 logger.info(f"WebSocket消息发送成功: dream_id={dream_id}, status={status}, images_count={len(image_urls or [])}")
 62	 return True
 63	 except Exception as e:
 64	 logger.warning(f"WebSocket消息发送失败 (尝试 {attempt + 1}/{max_retries}): {e}")
 65	 if attempt < max_retries - 1:
 66	 time.sleep(retry_delay)
 67	 
 68	 return False
 69	 
 70	 except Exception:
 71	 return False
...
